title: Modules, Packages, and Dependency Boundaries · Behavior Brief: Dependency Security
summary: Split the status coordinator into explicit browser modules and verify clean-environment loading and dependency behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js dependency security increment in a modular status application with a dependency record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Minimize, verify, update, and audit dependencies while treating install scripts and transitive code as executable supply-chain input.
Interpret package exports, imports, type, engines, scripts, lockfiles, and semantic versions at install and runtime boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
